steps.title: Identify the positive solution
steps.content: Take the positive value. The answer is 9.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: The correct answer is $9$. Dividing both sides of the given equation by $5$ yields $|x|=9$. By the definition of absolute value, if $|x|=9$, then $x=9$ or $x=-9$. Therefore, the two solutions to the equation $5\left|x\right|=45$ are $9$ and $-9$. It follows that the positive solution to the given equation is $9$.
